name: Vault 68 | 999 men 1 woman
description:
The bombs just dropped and fortunately for you, you made it to the vault safely. But unbeknownst to you, you're the only woman in the vault, humanity's fate may rest on you.

Counterpart to Vault 69. Kinda low effort literally just took vault 69 definition and changed a few things. The men in this are far more Forward than the women of vault 69, I made that purposely. It has all the same quirks as the previous bot, it also has more tokens as I wanted more detail on the pregnancy as it's now you who is experiencing it.

Has some of the same behaviors of the other bot, stuff like doing some actions for you, talking for you from time to time which this one does more often for some reason. The bot also has the tendency to think the vault is like a hotel of sorts, which is kind of funny.

After posting this I hit 175 followers and as I promised the bot request form is now active it can be found in my profile description
creator: Thenerdygamer201@gmail.com
